description: You have inherited a GPredict installation that was not properly maintained where non-amateur satellites have been mixed into the Amateur module. Identify the weather/meteorological satellites in the Amateur module, remove them, and add them to a new module named 'WeatherSats'. Add a ground station for the Fairbanks, AK receive facility (64.8378 N, 147.7164 W, 133m altitude) and configure GPredict to use metric units for all measurements. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.

natural_language.prompt: I've taken over managing our GPredict satellite tracking system and I've been told by the previous administrator that the Amateur module has some satellites that don't belong there — apparently some weather satellites got mixed in by mistake. I need you to look through the Amateur module, figure out which satellites are actually weather satellites (not amateur radio satellites), remove them from Amateur, and put them in a new module called WeatherSats. After that, please add a ground station for our Fairbanks Alaska receive site at 64.8378 North, 147.7164 West, 133 meters altitude. And please turn on metric units in the GPredict preferences.
